known_gaps: Generic I2C sensor plus connector PCB realization is tracked as a design-level expected-fail until pad-net correctness, routing, and KiCad DRC evidence are stable.
Routing is intentionally skipped so the fixture documents the current writer correctness blocker before broader sensor breakout layout proof.
notes: Tracks the richer sensor breakout scenario that should eventually graduate into a default KiCad-backed design example.
